message:
fix: six code-review bugs — misleading log, fragile parsing, ordering, cleanup

- refinery/engineer: only log "Acquired merge slot" on actual success
- refinery/engineer: always log slot release errors (remove fragile string filter)
- witness/handlers: use --json for bd create output parsing, fail on parse error
- polecat/manager: reorder RepairWorktree to remove worktree before resetting bead
- session/lifecycle: kill orphaned tmux session on verification error
- session/identity: document ParseSessionName collision with witness/refinery rig names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
